theory.canonical_statement: profound marks a reasoning pivot toward Quantum Phase Transitions: relevant to the black hole information paradox. appa\\Omega + \\lambda A^2 - \ u\\,\\rho, \\\\ \\dot \\rho &= -\\sigma \\rho + \\chi A^2, \\end aligned \\label eq:GoverningSystem \\end equation for parameters determined by the underlying TZP and cymatic kernels. \\label eq:Jacobian \\end equation In the explicit example discussed later, the eigenvalues of take the form \\begin equation \\lambda 1,2 = \\pm i \\omega 0, \\qquad \\lambda 3 0, \\label eq:Eigenvalues \\end equation signalling the presence of a two-dimensional center manifold and a one-dimensional stable manifold.

\item Source context: the chapter prose that explains why the formula belongs in the registry.
\item TRAWIN closure: the reading of the formula through time, rotation, action, wave, integration, and normalization.
